{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_21","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,260p' scripts/validation/rules/governed-file-coverage-rule.mjs"","aggregated_output":"// K2 VALIDATOR SUPPORT: governed file classification rule only.
// NO_PRODUCT_BEHAVIOR_K2_001: validator repository-shape metadata only; no product runtime behavior.

import { existsSync, readdirSync, statSync } from "node:fs";
import { extname, join } from "node:path";

const GOVERNED_DIRECTORIES = Object.freeze(["src", "tests", "scripts"]);
const GOVERNED_EXTENSIONS = Object.freeze([
  ".css",
  ".js",
  ".json",
  ".mjs",
  ".ts",
  ".tsx"
]);
const IGNORED_DIRECTORY_NAMES = Object.freeze([
  ".cache",
  ".git",
  "coverage",
  "dist",
  "node_modules",
  "out",
  "release"
]);

function normalizeRelativePath(relativePath) {
  return relativePath.split("\\").join("/");
}

function isProductSourceFile(relativePath) {
  return relativePath.startsWith("src/");
}

function collectGovernedFilesFromDirectory(root, directory, files) {
  const absoluteDirectory = join(root, directory);
  if (!existsSync(absoluteDirectory)) {
    return;
  }

  for (const entry of readdirSync(absoluteDirectory, { withFileTypes: true })) {
    const relativePath = normalizeRelativePath(join(directory, entry.name));

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      if (!IGNORED_DIRECTORY_NAMES.includes(entry.name)) {
        collectGovernedFilesFromDirectory(root, relativePath, files);
      }
      continue;
    }

    if (!entry.isFile()) {
      continue;
    }

    if (GOVERNED_EXTENSIONS.includes(extname(entry.name))) {
      files.push(relativePath);
    }
  }
}

export function collectGovernedFiles(root) {
  const files = [];

  for (const directory of GOVERNED_DIRECTORIES) {
    collectGovernedFilesFromDirectory(root, directory, files);
  }

  return files.sort();
}

export function validateGovernedFileCoverage({
  root,
  classifiedFiles,
  sourceBoundaryMarkerFiles = [],
  addError
}) {
  const classified = new Set(classifiedFiles);
  const sourceBoundaryCovered = new Set(sourceBoundaryMarkerFiles);

  for (const relativePath of sourceBoundaryCovered) {
    if (!classified.has(relativePath)) {
      addError(
        "K2-VALIDATOR-SOURCE-BOUNDARY-MARKER-INTEGRITY",
        `Source boundary marker entry is not a classified governed file: ${relativePath}`,
        { relativePath }
      );
    }
  }

  for (const relativePath of classified) {
    const absolutePath = join(root, relativePath);
    if (!existsSync(absolutePath) || !statSync(absolutePath).isFile()) {
      addError(
        "K2-VALIDATOR-STALE-CLASSIFIED-FILE",
        `Classified governed file does not exist: ${relativePath}`,
        { relativePath }
      );
    }
  }

  for (const relativePath of collectGovernedFiles(root)) {
    const absolutePath = join(root, relativePath);
    if (!existsSync(absolutePath) || !statSync(absolutePath).isFile()) {
      continue;
    }

    if (!classified.has(relativePath)) {
      addError(
        "K2-VALIDATOR-GOVERNED-FILE-COVERAGE",
        `Unclassified governed file found under src/, tests/, or scripts/: ${relativePath}`,
        { relativePath }
      );
      continue;
    }

    if (
      isProductSourceFile(relativePath) &&
      !sourceBoundaryCovered.has(relativePath)
    ) {
      addError(
        "K2-VALIDATOR-SOURCE-BOUNDARY-COVERAGE",
        `Governed source file missing boundary marker/pattern scan coverage: ${relativePath}`,
        { relativePath }
      );
    }
  }
}

function readText(root, relativePath) {
  return readFileSync(join(root, relativePath), "utf8");
}

function hasOwnNonEmptyObject(value) {
  return Boolean(
    value &&
      typeof value === "object" &&
      !Array.isArray(value) &&
      Object.keys(value).length > 0
  );
}

function escapeRegExp(value) {
  return value.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/gu, "\\$&");
}

function formatStringList(values) {
  return values.map((value) => `"${value}"`).join(", ");
}

function stringArraysEqual(actual, expected) {
  return (
    Array.isArray(actual) &&
    actual.length === expected.length &&
    actual.every((value, index) => value === expected[index])
  );
}

function extractStringArrayFromBody(body) {
  const values = [];
  const stringPattern = /"([^"]+)"/gu;
  let match = stringPattern.exec(body);

  while (match) {
    values.push(match[1]);
    match = stringPattern.exec(body);
  }

  return values;
}

function extractExportedFrozenStringArray(text, exportName) {
  const arrayPattern = new RegExp(
    String.raw`export\s+const\s+${exportName}\s*=\s*Object\.freeze\(\s*\[([\s\S]*?)\]\s*\)`,
    "u"
  );
  const match = text.match(arrayPattern);

  return match ? extractStringArrayFromBody(match[1]) : null;
}

function extractAssertedStringArray(text, exportedName) {
  const arrayPattern = new RegExp(
    String.raw`assert\.deepEqual\(\s*${exportedName}\s*,\s*\[([\s\S]*?)\]\s*\)`,
    "u"
  );
  const match = text.match(arrayPattern);

  return match ? extractStringArrayFromBody(match[1]) : null;
}

function addExactStringArrayError(errors, label, actual, expected) {
  if (!stringArraysEqual(actual, expected)) {
    errors.push(
      `${label} must be exactly [${formatStringList(expected)}]`

  }
}

  return strippedText;
}

  const endIndex = text.indexOf(endToken, startIndex + startToken.length);

  if (endIndex === -1) {
    return {
      found: true,

      text
    };
  }

  return {
    found: true,
    malformed: false,
    text: `${text.slice(0, startIndex)}${text.slice(endIndex + endToken.length)}`

}

function validateConfinedVocabularyGroup({ errors, resolvedRoot, relativePath, group }) {
  if (
    group.allowedFiles.includes(relativePath) ||
    !existsSync(join(resolvedRoot, relativePath))
  ) {
    return;
  }

  const text = group.stringLiteralExceptionFiles.includes(relativePath)
    ? stripSingleAndDoubleQuotedLiteralContents(readText(resolvedRoot, relativePath))
    : readText(resolvedRoot, relativePath);

  for (const token of group.vocabulary) {
    const tokenPattern = new RegExp(
      String.raw`(?:^|[^A-Za-z0-9_$])${escapeRegExp(token)}(?![A-Za-z0-9_$])`,
      "u"
    );

    if (tokenPattern.test(text)) {
      errors.addRule(
        group.ruleId,
        `${group.messagePrefix}: ${token} found in ${relativePath}`,
        {
          relativePath,
          token,
          lifecycle: group.lifecycle
        }
      );
    }
  }
}

function validateConfinedVocabularyGroups({ errors, resolvedRoot }) {
  for (const group of CONFINED_VOCABULARY_GROUPS) {
    for (const relativePath of REQUIRED_FILES) {
      validateConfinedVocabularyGroup({
        errors,
        resolvedRoot,
        relativePath,
        group
      });
    }
  }
}

function addDuplicateEntryErrors({
  values,
  getValue = (value) => value,
  ruleId,
  messagePrefix,
  addError
}) {
  const seen = new Set();

  for (const entry of values) {
    const value = getValue(entry);
    if (typeof value !== "string" || value.length === 0) {
      continue;
    }

    if (seen.has(value)) {
      addError(ruleId, `${messagePrefix}: ${value}`, { value });
      continue;
    }

    seen.add(value);
  }
}

export function validateValidatorConfiguration({
  requiredFiles = REQUIRED_FILES,
  governedFilesWithBoundaryMarkers = GOVERNED_FILES_WITH_BOUNDARY_MARKERS,
  governedFilesWithoutAuthorityFieldNames =
    GOVERNED_FILES_WITHOUT_AUTHORITY_FIELD_NAMES,
  forbiddenSourcePatterns = FORBIDDEN_SOURCE_PATTERNS,
  confinedVocabularyGroups = CONFINED_VOCABULARY_GROUPS,
  addError
} = {}) {
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: requiredFiles,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-REQUIRED-FILE",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate validator required file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: governedFilesWithBoundaryMarkers,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-BOUNDARY-MARKER",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate governed boundary marker file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: governedFilesWithoutAuthorityFieldNames,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-GOVERNED-AUTHORITY-FIELD-SCAN-FILE",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate governed authority-field scan file entry",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: forbiddenSourcePatterns,
    getValue: (pattern) => pattern.id,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-DENIED-SOURCE-PATTERN-ID",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate denied source pattern ID",
    addError
  });
  addDuplicateEntryErrors({
    values: confinedVocabularyGroups,
    getValue: (group) => group.ruleId,
    ruleId: "K2-VALIDATOR-DUPLICATE-CONFINED-VOCABULARY-GROUP-ID",
    messagePrefix: "Duplicate confined vocabulary group rule ID",
    addError
  });
}

export function validateFoundation(root = DEFAULT_ROOT) {
  const resolvedRoot = resolve(root);
  const errors = createRuleErrorCollector();

  validateValidatorConfiguration({ addError: errors.addRule });

  for (const relativePath of REQUIRED_FILES) {
    const absolutePath = join(resolvedRoot, relativePath);
    if (!existsSync(absolutePath)) {
      errors.push(`Missing required file: ${relativePath}`);
      continue;
    }

    if (!statSync(absolutePath).isFile()) {
      errors.push(`Required path is not a file: ${relativePath}`);
    }
  }

  validateGovernedFileCoverage({
    root: resolvedRoot,
    classifiedFiles: REQUIRED_FILES,
    sourceBoundaryMarkerFiles: GOVERNED_FILES_WITH_BOUNDARY_MARKERS,

function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Object.isFrozen(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  if (seen.has(value)) {
    return value;
  }

  seen.add(value);

  for (const child of Object.values(value)) {
    deepFreeze(child, seen);
  }

  return Object.freeze(value);
}

function createWarningList(initialReasons = []) {
  const warnings = [];

  for (const reason of initialReasons) {

}
